Alexander Binder 6 Emmanuel M¨uller 1 Marius Kloft 2
Abstract
Despite the great advances made by deep learn-
ing in many machine learning problems, there
is a relative dearth of deep learning approaches
for anomaly detection.
concepts.implication: General ML methodology applicable to content recommendation

concepts.finding:
In this paper we introduce a new anomaly
detection method—Deep Support Vector Data
Description—, which is trained on an anomaly
detection based objective.
